channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Flight Disruptions at Reagan National Airport Linked to Airspace Restrictions Around White House UFC Event
item.description: Reports emerged on June 13, 2026, that operations at Ronald Reagan Washington National Airport experienced significant disruptions, including temporary ground stops and flight delays, as preparations ...

item.title: George Conway Releases Ad Criticizing Trump's Cognitive Health and Predicting Future Legal Accountability
item.description: Former Republican attorney and longtime Donald Trump critic George Conway released a new political advertisement targeting the president's cognitive health and legal exposure. In the ad, Conway mocks ...

item.title: Republican Strategist Criticizes Trump’s White House UFC Event and Questions Timing of Iran Agreement
item.description: A political discussion on MS NOW focused on criticism of President Donald Trump’s planned UFC event at the White House and its potential political consequences. Republican strategist Susan Del Percio ...

item.title: Australia outclass South Africa by 65 runs in Women's T20 World Cup opener
item.description: South Africa suffered a heavy 65-run defeat to Australia in their opening match of the Women's T20 World Cup at Old Trafford in Manchester. Chasing a competitive target of 173, the Proteas failed to b...

item.title: Growing Opposition to AI Data Centers Creates New Challenge for House Campaigns in Battleground Districts
item.description: A growing wave of public opposition to artificial intelligence data centers is emerging as a significant political issue in U.S. House races, particularly in competitive congressional districts. Accor...

item.title: Morocco and Brazil Share Points in 1-1 Draw During 2026 World Cup Opening Match
item.description: Morocco and Brazil played to a 1-1 draw in their opening Group Stage match of the 2026 FIFA World Cup at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey on June 13. Morocco delivered an impressive performance and contr...

item.title: Ghana Fisheries Leaders Call for Stronger Law Enforcement to Protect Marine Resources and Coastal Livelihoods
item.description: The article examines the growing challenges facing Ghana’s fishing communities and highlights calls for stronger enforcement of fisheries laws to ensure the long-term sustainability of marine resource...

item.title: Vinícius Júnior earns Brazil a draw against Morocco in opening World Cup group match
item.description: Brazil and Morocco played to a 1-1 draw in a highly anticipated Group C match at the expanded FIFA World Cup held at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey. Morocco, one of the tournament’s strongest non-Europ...

item.title: The 1968 Marcos 1600 GT and Its Innovative Lightweight Sports Car Design
item.description: The article highlights the 1968 Marcos 1600 GT, a distinctive British sports car that has become an icon of late-1960s automotive design. Created by brothers Dennis and Peter Adams, the vehicle stood ...

item.title: Sen. Jeff Merkley Criticizes Trump Family's UFC Commemorative Coin Venture Linked to White House Event
item.description: Sen. Jeff Merkley of Oregon publicly criticized President Donald Trump over plans to host a UFC event on the White House grounds while Trump-branded commemorative coins tied to the event are being mar...

item.title: Report Claims Trump Rejected Internal Discussions About Managing Public Attention on His 80th Birthday
item.description: A report based on comments from author and longtime Trump biographer Michael Wolff claims that President Donald Trump has resisted discussions within his inner circle about how to address public atten...

item.title: Epstein Survivors Use Trump's 80th Birthday to Highlight His Past Association With Jeffrey Epstein
item.description: Two survivors connected to the Jeffrey Epstein case, Marina Lacerda and Andrea Sterling, used President Donald Trump's 80th birthday as an opportunity to draw public attention to documents related to ...

item.title: Federal Judge Strikes Down Trump-Era Immigration Benefit Freeze, Appeal Expected to Reach Supreme Court

item.title: Toronto businesses see mixed economic impact as World Cup fans arrive
item.description: The economic effects of the 2026 FIFA World Cup in Toronto are beginning to emerge as the city hosts its first men’s tournament matches. Thousands of international fans have arrived in Toronto, fillin...

item.title: Pollsters Report Growing Dissatisfaction Among Some Trump Supporters Over Economic Conditions and the Iran Conflict
item.description: A Raw Story article highlights claims from Democratic pollster Molly Murphy and other political strategists that some voters who supported President Donald Trump have become increasingly dissatisfied ...

item.title: White House responds after Sen. Ted Cruz breaks with Trump in GOP primary endorsements

item.title: Leaked video of MAGA influencer Riley Gaines discussing personal beliefs with sponsor prompts online backlash
item.description: A leaked video involving MAGA influencer Riley Gaines has circulated online, drawing widespread criticism and ridicule from commentators and political figures. In the footage, Gaines appears to be spe...

item.title: MMA Writer Claims Ari Emanuel Played a Key Role in Promoting Trump's Association With UFC and Combat Sports

item.title: Motorists Association Opposes NTSA Proposal to Charge for E-Logbook Conversion, Calling It Double Taxation
item.description: The Motorists Association of Kenya (MAK) has strongly opposed the National Transport and Safety Authority’s (NTSA) proposal to introduce charges for converting physical vehicle logbooks into electroni...

item.title: Five children killed in two-vehicle collision near Kitchener-Waterloo, OPP say
item.description: Five children have died and several others have been injured following a serious two-vehicle collision in rural Ontario, according to the Ontario Provincial Police (OPP). The crash occurred around 7:3...
